name: mpp/x402 Payments Proxy
description: x402 and MPP payments, wallet tools, and paid inference proxying

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Generate or import a crypto wallet for paid inference

providers.description: Provider catalog keyed by name. Defaults to the built-in surf provider when omitted.

baseUrl.description: Gateway base path for this provider, typically under /x402-proxy

upstreamUrl.description: Upstream inference origin to proxy to

protocol.description: Payment protocol for this provider. Defaults to mpp.

mppSessionBudget.description: Maximum USDC budget to lock for MPP sessions for this provider (default: 0.5)

models.description: Static OpenClaw model catalog entries for this provider

protocol.description: Default payment protocol fallback for providers that do not override it.

mppSessionBudget.description: Default maximum USDC budget to lock for MPP sessions (default: 0.5)

keypairPath.description: Optional path to Solana keypair JSON file (overrides x402-proxy wallet resolution for Solana/x402 surfaces)

protocol.label: Default protocol
protocol.help: Used only when a provider entry does not set its own protocol.
